summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without GitHub mutation. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All hydrated seed PRs remain open and useful enough to keep; no low-signal, duplicate, superseded, or security-sensitive closeout is safe under this job's permissions and evidence.
